channel.title: Finance 新闻汇总 - Free News Agent
channel.description: Finance 分类的最新新闻汇总，由 Free News Agent 自动生成，Gemini AI 筛选优质内容。

item.title: US military says blockade of Iranian ports is ‘fully implemented’

item.title: Iran faces halt to oil production within weeks if US blockade succeeds

item.title: ‘Bifs’ replace ‘Piigs’ as Europe’s bond market whipping boys

item.title: China shock 2.0: should Europe repel Chinese investment?
